summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 critical booked-role workflow bug fixes. All fixes verified working: 1) key props on MemorizationMode/SceneReader force component remount when switching scenes, 2) prepMode prop flows correctly to BreakdownView which conditionally hides Self-Tape Tips for booked role, 3) Lines First hero card appears correctly for booked role with Memorize and Run Lines buttons.
passed_tests: Code Review: MemorizationMode has key={`memo-${id}`} prop in App.js line 419 - PASS
Code Review: SceneReader has key={`reader-${id}`} prop in App.js line 430 - PASS
Code Review: BreakdownView accepts prepMode prop in function signature (line 77) - PASS
Code Review: Self-Tape Tips conditional {prepMode !== 'booked' && ...} in BreakdownView.jsx line 594 - PASS
Code Review: Lines First card has data-testid='lines-first-card' in ScriptOverview.jsx - PASS
Code Review: Lines First Memorize button has data-testid='lines-first-memorize' - PASS
Code Review: Lines First Run Lines button has data-testid='lines-first-run-lines' - PASS
Code Review: prepMode={prepMode} passed to BreakdownView in ScriptOverview.jsx line 382 - PASS
UI Test: Full Script flow with Booked Role shows Lines First card - PASS
UI Test: Lines First card shows correct line count (3 lines in this scene) - PASS
UI Test: Lines First card Memorize button clickable and opens MemorizationMode - PASS
UI Test: Self-Tape Tips card HIDDEN for Booked Role prepMode - PASS
UI Test: Full Script flow with Audition mode shows Self-Tape Tips card - PASS
UI Test: Lines First card NOT shown for Audition mode (correct) - PASS
UI Test: MemorizationMode opens correctly with SARAH's lines - PASS
UI Test: MemorizationMode shows tabs (My Lines, Line Run, Reader, Cue & Recall) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: App.js lines 418-424: MemorizationMode correctly uses key={`memo-${id}`} to force remount when activeScriptBreakdown changes - this fixes the stale lines bug when switching scenes
App.js lines 428-437: SceneReader correctly uses key={`reader-${id}`} to force remount when switching scenes
BreakdownView.jsx line 77: prepMode prop correctly added to function signature
BreakdownView.jsx line 594: Self-Tape Tips card correctly wrapped in {prepMode !== 'booked' && ...} conditional
ScriptOverview.jsx lines 172-210: Lines First hero card correctly shows only when prepMode='booked' AND scene has cue_recall data AND scene is not failed
ScriptOverview.jsx line 382: prepMode correctly passed from ScriptOverview to BreakdownView
seed_data_creation: Test script with 2 scenes (INT. KITCHEN - DAY, INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT) for SARAH character
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 booked-role workflow bugs are fixed and verified: 1) key props on MemorizationMode/SceneReader ensure fresh component state when switching scenes, 2) prepMode prop flows from ScriptOverview to BreakdownView and conditionally hides Self-Tape Tips for booked role, 3) Lines First hero card (data-testid='lines-first-card') appears for booked role with Memorize and Run Lines buttons. The Lines First card shows line count from memorization.cue_recall.length and only appears when prepMode='booked', scene is not failed, and cue_recall data exists.

memorization_mode_key_prop.details: key={`memo-${id}`} forces component remount when switching scenes

scene_reader_key_prop.details: key={`reader-${id}`} forces component remount when switching scenes

prep_mode_prop_flow.details: prepMode flows from ScriptOverview to BreakdownView correctly

self_tape_tips_conditional.details: Self-Tape Tips hidden when prepMode='booked', shown for other modes

lines_first_card.details: Shows for booked role with Memorize and Run Lines buttons, displays correct line count
